hero.title: Reclaiming the Economics of Community
hero.desc: The Trade Box Eng. is your all-in-one platform for community economic sovereignty. Empowering families, diaspora networks, and cooperatives to thrive on their own terms.

ecosystem.title: A Human-Inspired Ecosystem That Grows Like Wildfire
ecosystem.desc: This model works like the human body—every person or Business (or 'cell') can freely join or be invited to different organs (communities or networks). Just as cells support the heart, lungs, or other organs, people and Businesses in this system trade seamlessly based on common values.

noGatekeepers.title: No Gatekeepers
noGatekeepers.desc: Like social media, anyone can join or invite others, removing friction. No central authority to slow down growth.

networkEffects.title: Network Effects
networkEffects.desc: The more people participate, the more valuable the ecosystem becomes (just like Facebook or WhatsApp).

selfSustaining.title: Self-Sustaining
selfSustaining.desc: Once critical mass is hit, growth accelerates organically as members recruit others, fueling a viral loop.

modular.title: Modular & Scalable
modular.desc: New 'organs' (sub-communities) can form instantly, adapting to local demand and specific needs.

incentivized.title: Incentivized Participation
incentivized.desc: People benefit by contributing (like cells in a body), fueling viral adoption and long-term sustainability.

features.title: The TBE Operating System
features.subtitle: Explore the pillars of our community economic engine.

zeroCost.title: Zero-Cost Access
zeroCost.desc: No fees to load, spend, or send. We remove the tax on community trade.

supportBonus.title: Support Bonus
supportBonus.desc: Earn social capital from every trade. Use it to fund community businesses.

bnpl.title: BNPL Credit
bnpl.desc: 0% interest credit based on community trust and trade history.

interconnection.title: Interconnection
interconnection.desc: Seamlessly trade between different community networks with zero friction.

techSpotlight.title: Tech Spotlight
techSpotlight.desc: Our platform is built on cutting-edge financial technology designed to solve the specific challenges of the African market. From biometric security to AI-driven risk assessment, we ensure every trade is secure and transparent.
techSpotlight.biometricsDesc: Facial and fingerprint verification for all high-value trades.
techSpotlight.iotDesc: Sensors track inventory and trigger payments automatically.

fraudProof.title: Fraud-Proof Trading
fraudProof.desc: Advanced encryption and biometric multi-sig ensure your assets are always protected.

aiRisk.title: AI Risk Engine
aiRisk.desc: Our proprietary algorithms analyze community trade patterns to provide fair credit access.

cta.title: Ready to Launch Your Economy?
cta.desc: Join thousands of communities already reclaiming their economic sovereignty with the Magic Trade Box.

dashboard.overviewSub: Manage your community assets and growth pools.

overviewTab.title: Dashboard Overview
overviewTab.subtitle: Manage your community assets and growth pools.

market.title: Internal Support Market
market.desc: Support verified members' business requests using your Social Capital. No debt, no interest—just shared community growth.

networks.subtitle: Interconnect with the economies that matter to you.
networks.interconnectionDesc: Connect your networks to allow seamless trade across different community pools. Expand your internal market safely.

settingsTab.subtitle: Manage your identity, security, and preferences.
settingsTab.dangerDesc: Permanently close your account and liquidate community assets.

walletTab.subtitle: Manage your multi-currency assets and secure payments.
walletTab.merchantFees: No merchant fees for MTB members

receive.instruction: Scanning this QR will initiate a biometric-verified trade within the network.

join.desc: Invite codes are issued by community administrators. Once joined, your zero-cost wallet will be initialized for this network.

shop.title: Pay Any Shop of the Community, Any time
shop.desc: Helloopass connects merchants and customers with the most flexible payment ecosystem in Africa. Seamless, secure, and community-driven.
shop.modernTech: Modern technology meeting the heartbeat of local commerce.
shop.versatileSubtitle: Choose the method that works best for your community.

app.title: App Payment
app.desc: Pay instantly via the Helloopass app using your balance or social capital.

nfc.title: NFC Contactless
nfc.desc: Tap your phone or card on the merchant terminal for a lightning-fast checkout.

ussd.title: USSD Code
ussd.desc: No internet? No problem. Dial our shortcode to authorize payments from any phone.

bnpl.title: Buy Now, Pay Later
bnpl.desc: Get what you need now and pay in flexible community-backed installments.

journey.title: The Seamless
journey.subtitle: Customer Journey
journey.desc: From selection to settlement, every step is optimized for the African market context.

step1.title: Discover & Selection
step1.desc: Customer visits a verified community shop and selects items.

step2.title: Payment Request
step2.desc: Merchant initiates a payment request via their Magic Trade Box terminal.

step3.title: Identity Verification
step3.desc: Customer confirms identity through biometrics or secure PIN.

step4.title: Instant Settlement
step4.desc: Funds are moved from customer to merchant wallet in real-time.

growthEngine.title: Unlock Your
growthEngine.subtitle: Credit Potential
growthEngine.desc: Our BNPL model isn't based on legacy credit scores. It's built on your participation and reputation within your community trade network.

common.comingSoon: features are currently being synchronized with our biometric engine. Check back soon!

bnplPage.title: Why Helloopass BNPL is Unique
bnplPage.subtitle: Community-Controlled, Trade-Based, and Risk-Smart
bnplPage.desc: The Helloopass BNPL model is designed specifically for how credit actually works in Africa - and it fixes the broken parts.

merchantLed.title: Merchants extend credit to
merchantLed.subtitle: Known Customers
merchantLed.desc: HellOOpass provides merchants with a credit line that they can extend to their own customers. The merchant knows the customer personally and the credit is tied to specific trade.
points: Credit used only for trade transactions
Merchant gets paid instantly by HellOOpass
merchantLed.illustrationDesc: A South African entrepreneur in Johannesburg initiating a digital trade credit request.

supplierCrisis.title: Solving the
supplierCrisis.subtitle: Supplier Credit Crisis

problem.title: The Problem
problem.desc: Wholesalers wait weeks for payment. Cash flow is locked, preventing restocking and growth.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.desc: Instant liquidity. Wholesalers get paid immediately by HellOOpass on delivery.

supplierCrisis.exampleDesc: She buys stock from wholesalers and resells to her local community.

collectiveTrust.title: Empowering communities
collectiveTrust.subtitle: via Collective Trust
collectiveTrust.desc: Trade unions gain collective credit lines, ensuring even small traders can participate in digital trade networks.
collectiveTrust.illustrationDesc: South African business leaders and trade union members facilitating collective credit.

onlinePayment.title: How Online Payment Works with Helloopass
onlinePayment.desc: Customer clicks 'Pay with Helloopass' at online checkout, authenticates with fingerprint or PIN, and payment is instant—with funds settling immediately to the merchant's wallet. (NFC card is for physical shops only.)
onlinePayment.authDesc: Security is at the heart of every transaction. Choose the method that suits your device.
onlinePayment.comparisonSubtitle: Choose the right method for your situation
onlinePayment.customerSeesSubtitle: A clean, intuitive interface designed for speed
onlinePayment.keyBenefitsSubtitle: Why merchants and customers prefer Helloopass
onlinePayment.luandaDesc: Experience the power of instant community payments
onlinePayment.modernBusinessDesc: Professional tools for the modern Angolan economy
onlinePayment.nfcNote: Note: The NFC companion card is only for physical, in-person payments at shops with NFC terminals. It cannot be used for online transactions.

step1.title: 1. Customer Shops Online
step1.desc: Customer browses an e-commerce website, mobile app, ride-hailing app, educational platform, or any online service that accepts Helloopass payments.

step2.title: 2. Customer Selects Helloopass
step2.desc: Customer clicks the Helloopass payment button. They are prompted to choose their community and preferred method: Wallet balance or BNPL.

step3.title: 3. Authentication Happens
step3.desc: Customer verifies identity through In-App Approval, PIN Entry, or OTP.

step4.title: 4. Payment is Processed
step4.desc: Helloopass verifies balance, identity, and permissions. Funds are instantly deducted from the customer's wallet.

step5.title: 5. Order is Confirmed
step5.desc: The online store confirms the order. Customer receives email, SMS, and in-app notifications.

step6.title: 6. Settlement to Merchant
step6.desc: Funds are available immediately in the merchant's Helloopass wallet.

clearingHouse.title: Automated Clearing House
clearingHouse.desc: Helloopass utilizes a tiered clearing house model to optimize for both speed and control, bridging the gap between immediate digital transactions and traditional financial systems.
clearingHouse.visualDesc: Our infrastructure decouples credit settlement from payment finality, allowing for unprecedented transaction speeds while maintaining strict regulatory compliance.

layer1.title: Intra-Community
layer1.desc: Facilitates real-time clearing and settlement of transactions between members of the same community.

layer2.title: Inter-Community / Domestic
layer2.desc: Manages clearing between different communities operating within the same country.

layer3.title: Cross-Border
layer3.desc: Handles clearing and compliance for transactions between communities in different countries.

developer.title: Order, Bill, Settle and Pay OS for Pan-African Apps
developer.desc: Stop fighting red tape. Start writing code. Build and launch fintech solutions across 54 countries with a single integration.
developer.partnershipTitle: Built with the Most Advanced AI Developer Community in Africa
developer.partnershipDesc: Helloopass partnered with Gebeya AI, the continent's leading ecosystem of AI developers. This collaboration ensures your apps are built on the most robust AI infrastructure, leveraging the top 1% of African tech talent.
developer.apiSubtitle: Over 200 endpoints to power your innovation.
regulatoryPoints: Launching fintech apps in Africa usually requires separate licenses for 54+ countries.
Each country has different regulators, complex requirements, and uncertain timelines.
Licensing can take 6—24 months and cost hundreds of thousands of dollars.
developer.solutionDesc: Helloopass provides the compliance infrastructure out of the box. No licensing barriers. One integration gives you immediate access to a pan-African network.
developer.eliteInfra: Access elite infrastructure and join a vetted community of African tech talent.
developer.realWorldChallenges: Solve real-world challenges like transport payments with frictionless APIs.
developer.dayOne: Connect with active communities and cooperatives from day one.
developer.instantAccessDesc: Plug into economic cells with thousands of active members.
developer.complianceDesc: We handle the KYC, AML, and data privacy across all borders.
developer.revenueDesc: Keep the majority of your earnings. No upfront platform fees.
developer.bridgeGap: Bridge the gap between formal banking and local cooperatives.

architecture.title: Helloopass Service Layers: A Simple Breakdown
architecture.subtitle: Helloopass trading OS operates on a flexible, modular platform that can be deployed in different ways depending on what a client needs. Think of it like a set of LEGO blocks—clients can take just one block or combine several to build their complete solution.
architecture.flexibilityDesc: Every component of the HellOOpass ecosystem is designed to be modular, ensuring that your financial architecture can evolve as fast as your community does.
architecture.modularityDesc: The most powerful feature of Helloopass is that clients can mix and match these layers. A cooperative might start with just the Trade Hub, then add the Compliance Shield as they grow, and eventually use the Core Engine to offer savings accounts to members.
architecture.scaleCapabilities: The flexibility of our platform allows you to choose exactly what you need today, with the peace of mind that you can scale to full banking capabilities tomorrow.

core.title: Layer 1: The Core Banking Engine (The Engine Room)
core.desc: The fundamental technology that runs financial accounts, processes transactions, and manages ledgers.
core.analogy: Like the engine of a car. The client provides the body and the brand, Helloopass provides the engine that makes it move.

compliance.title: Layer 2: The Compliance & Regulatory Shield (The Safety Net)
compliance.desc: Pre-built tools that automatically handle Know Your Customer (KYC), Anti-Money Laundering (AML), fraud detection, and regulatory reporting.
compliance.analogy: Like having a built-in security guard and lawyer who constantly checks everything and keeps you out of trouble.

embedded.title: Layer 3: The Embedded Finance Layer (The Toolkit)
embedded.desc: A set of APIs (software connectors) that allow other companies to plug financial services directly into their own apps or websites.
embedded.analogy: Like a restaurant adding a payment terminal—they don't build the payment system, they just plug it in and start accepting cards.

trade.title: Layer 4: The Trade & Marketplace Hub (The Community Market)
trade.desc: A complete digital marketplace solution that combines trading, payments, logistics tracking, and community financing in one platform.
trade.analogy: Like building a digital village market where people can list goods, find buyers, pay securely, and access small loans—all in one trusted place.

whiteLabel.title: Layer 5: Digital Trading (Trade-In-a-Box)
whiteLabel.desc: A complete, ready-to-launch digital bank or wallet that carries the client's brand but runs on Helloopass technology.
whiteLabel.analogy: Like a franchise restaurant. You get the full package—recipes, equipment, training—and put your name on the door.

communities.title: Every Collective
communities.desc: HellOOpass isn't just a platform; it's a foundation for specialized economies designed by and for the people who live them.
communities.ctaTitle: Ready to create your own Community Network?
communities.ctaDesc: Start with the Magic Trade Box and watch your community's economic power grow through trust, transparency, and shared value.

labels.howItWorks: How It Works with the MTB

farmers.title: The Sustainable Farmers' Cooperative
farmers.desc: A cooperative of 500 small-scale organic farmers seeking to cut out intermediaries, ensure fair pricing, and gain access to credit.
farmers.howItWorks: The cooperative launches its own 'Farm-to-Table' marketplace. Customers scan a QR code to pay directly into the cooperative's system with no transaction fees, and each purchase earns them a free Support Bonus.
farmers.empowerment: Farmers can post verified requests for cash to buy seeds. Customers and other members can use their free bonuses to support these requests, earning a share of the profit from the future harvest sales.

taxi.title: The Collective Asset Fund
taxi.desc: Un groupe social ou familial étroit dont les membres veulent mutualiser des ressources pour créer des actifs de vie pour l'un des leurs.
taxi.howItWorks: Members create a 'Family Asset Fund' within the platform. They make deposits with no fees into a designated, shared digital wallet.
taxi.empowerment: The collective fund provides the security for a partner financial institution to issue the vehicle loan. Repayments are automated through the platform.

gig.title: The Urban Gig Worker Collective
gig.desc: A collective of freelance drivers, delivery personnel, and taskers in a major city, lacking access to traditional financial services.
gig.howItWorks: The collective forms a 'Gig Worker Union' network. Members receive a digital wallet and a virtual card. Clients pay through the platform.
gig.empowerment: A driver needing a cash advance can post a request. Other members support it with free bonuses, sharing in the profit.

diaspora.title: The Diaspora Support Network
diaspora.desc: A diaspora community wanting to support families and businesses in their home country with targeted, secure remittances.
diaspora.howItWorks: The community creates a 'Homeland Support' network. Members abroad load funds and purchase specific-purpose gift cards.
diaspora.empowerment: Recipients redeem cards at approved merchants. Each transaction generates a Community Support Bonus.

arts.title: The Cultural Arts & Crafts Guild
arts.desc: An indigenous community of artisans whose traditional crafts are undervalued, with profits lost to middlemen.
arts.howItWorks: The guild sets up its 'Heritage Makers' branded marketplace. Buyers pay directly to the artisan without added fees.
arts.empowerment: Buyers can use free bonuses to support an artisan's material request, sharing in the profit from large orders.

aid.title: The Humanitarian Aid Corridor
aid.desc: An international NGO distributing aid in a refugee camp, aiming for efficiency, transparency, and local economic stimulation.
aid.howItWorks: The NGO creates an 'Aid & Dignity' network. Aid is distributed as digital vouchers redeemed at local kiosks.
aid.empowerment: Small businesses can post requests for microloans. Beneficiaries support these businesses with accumulated bonuses.

communityTrading.title: Your Own Community Trading Network
communityTrading.desc: Helloopass provides the technology infrastructure that communities use to run their own closed-loop trading ecosystems. Each community operates independently, with its own members, merchants, and rules.
communityTrading.coreConceptDesc: Helloopass doesn't own the communities; it empowers them with professional-grade financial technology.
communityTrading.completeFlowDesc: Follow the journey of value from community adoption to merchant settlement.
communityTrading.multipleCommunitiesDesc: Helloopass can power hundreds of independent communities simultaneously. Each is a separate, closed-loop ecosystem.
communityTrading.whatWeProvideDesc: Helloopass is the end-to-end infrastructure partner for your community economy.
communityTrading.ctaDesc: Build your own digital trading ecosystem securely and efficiently with Helloopass infrastructure.
communityTrading.engineDesc: Helloopass powers the background technology and compliance.
communityTrading.vehicleDesc: Communities own their brand, members, and local trust.
communityTrading.whiteLabeledDesc: Each group has its own branded platform and identity.
communityTrading.independentDesc: Communities onboard their own members and merchants.
communityTrading.infrastructureDesc: We provide payment processing and settlement rails.
communityTrading.closedLoopDesc: Trust and value remain within the local community ecosystem.

connectCommunities.title: COMMUNITY CONNECTIVITY
connectCommunities.desc: Communities on HellOOpass are autonomous nodes that can choose to connect with other communities—locally, regionally, or globally—to expand trading opportunities while maintaining their own governance.
connectCommunities.bilateralDesc: Two communities must both agree to connect.
connectCommunities.controlDesc: Each community decides who they connect with and on what terms.
connectCommunities.noLimitsDesc: A community can connect with 1 or 1,000+ other communities.
connectCommunities.openOptionDesc: A community can welcome members from any community worldwide.
connectCommunities.result: RESULT: DIRECT, SECURE CROSS-BORDER TRADE BENEFITING BOTH COMMUNITIES.
connectCommunities.governanceDesc: When communities connect, they agree on a set of automated rules enforced by the HellOOpass platform.
connectCommunities.visionQuote: HellOOpass doesn't build one giant marketplace. It helps thousands of communities build bridges between their marketplaces.
connectCommunities.visionDesc: From village cooperatives to continental trading networks—communities choose their connections, grow at their own pace, and collectively build a Pan-African trading ecosystem.

economicCells.title: Distributed Economic Cells System
economicCells.desc: The Global Economic Cell System is the foundation of our decentralized economy, where every participant is a vital part of a self-sustaining network.
economicCells.ctaDesc: The Global Economic Cell System is your gateway to a world of borderless commerce and community-driven prosperity.

c1.title: You Are a Cell in the Global Economy
c1.desc: Your identity and economic activity are tied to your digital 'cell,' which acts as your passport in this system.

c2.title: Automatic Wallet for Every Cell
c2.desc: Each cell comes with a default digital wallet for transactions.

c3.title: Real-Time Wallet Funding
c3.desc: You can add funds instantly using any recognized payment method, with no restrictions.

c4.title: Stablecoin can backup credits
c4.desc: All wallet credits are backed by a stablecoin from the country where you opened your cell account.

c5.title: Sell Goods & Services Freely
c5.desc: Cells can open shops and trade with others, following the trade license rules.

c6.title: Earning Wallets for Shops
c6.desc: Each shop gets a dedicated wallet to collect sales revenue.

c7.title: Link Earnings to Bank Accounts
c7.desc: You can connect your earning wallet to your preferred bank accounts.

c8.title: Instant Cash-Out
c8.desc: Convert credits to cash with one click; the amount transfers to your bank.

c9.title: Create & Govern Communities
c9.desc: Cells can form groups, set trading rules, and communicate legally.

c10.title: Seamless Multilingual Communication
c10.desc: AI instantly translates messages so cells can interact in any language.

c11.title: Integrate External Platforms
c11.desc: Cells can connect their digital tools, as long as they follow system policies.

c12.title: Custom Payment Solutions
c12.desc: Communities can set up escrow accounts and offer flexible payment terms.

c13.title: Bank & Financial Institution Integration
c13.desc: All cash-based transactions go through regulated escrow accounts.

c14.title: Full Regulatory Compliance
c14.desc: Every transaction follows the laws of the countries involved.

footer.tagline: The next generation of settlement infrastructure for modern communities and cross-border commerce.

architectureDiagram.title: Infrastructure Visualization
architectureDiagram.subtitle: How data flows through the tiered clearing house model

settlementLogic.title: Real-Time Credit,
settlementLogic.subtitle: Flexible Settlement.
settlementLogic.desc: We separate credit availability from fiat movement to provide the best of both worlds: immediate liquidity for users and operational control for admins.
settlementLogic.realTimeDesc: Across all layers, credit is settled instantly. Funds are visible and usable by the recipient immediately upon transaction authorization.
settlementLogic.flexibleDesc: The actual movement of physical currency can be configured to occur at scheduled times (daily, weekly) or triggered on-demand by the platform operator.

partnership.title: Building the Future of African Trade, Together
partnership.subtitle: Helloopass trading OS operates on a flexible, modular platform that can be deployed in different ways depending on what a client needs.

community.title: Community Leaders
community.subtitle: Empower your local ecosystem.
community.desc: Lead your community towards economic sovereignty with our specialized tools for local trade and collective growth.

developer.title: African Developers
developer.subtitle: Build the next generation of Fintech.
developer.desc: Access our robust APIs and infrastructure to create powerful applications tailored for the African market.

finance.title: Financial Institutions
finance.subtitle: Bridge traditional and digital finance.
finance.desc: Partner with us to offer innovative digital banking services and reach underserved markets efficiently.

gateway.title: Payment Gateways
gateway.subtitle: Expand your reach across borders.
gateway.desc: Connect with our pan-African network to provide seamless cross-border payment solutions.

investor.title: Strategic Investors
investor.subtitle: Fueling sustainable growth.
investor.desc: Join us in backing the infrastructure that is reclaiming the economics of community across the continent.

franchise.title: Franchise Partners
franchise.subtitle: Scale a proven model.
franchise.desc: Bring the Magic Trade Box ecosystem to new regions with our complete franchise support and technology package.
